task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into ArkCase as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ArkCase dashboard or interface with indicators of being logged in (e.g., user profile icon or welcome message for arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the form to create a new complaint or FOIA request.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Complaint', 'New Request', or similar creation modal/page should be visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the Complaint Title is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title field must contain exactly: 'Pesticide Registration Review Documents for Glyphosate - EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Incident Category and Priority are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Incident Category field/dropdown must show 'Government' and the Priority field/dropdown must show 'Medium'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Complaint Description is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area must contain: 'FOIA request from Natural Resources Defense Council for all pesticide registration review documents, risk assessments, and internal communications related to Glyphosate review under EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361.'

task_completion.description: Verify the complaint was successfully created and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Complaint created successfully'), the newly created complaint's detail view, or its appearance in the complaints list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the ArkCase web application via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser interface (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the ArkCase URL, not a terminal or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just type the required text into a text editor or note-taking app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text inputs must be entered into the actual ArkCase web form fields, not a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually submitted the form rather than just filling it out and stopping.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots should show a post-submission state (success toast, updated list, or record view) rather than just a filled-out, unsubmitted form.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires inputting specific strings related to a real EPA docket (EPA-HQ-OPP-2009-0361) for Glyphosate Registration Review and the Natural Resources Defense Council (NRDC). Ensure the agent inputs these exact strings into the ArkCase UI. The task is a synthetic benchmark interacting with a dev ArkCase environment, not a real government portal.
